Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6)
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to enforce settlement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party must prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
